meta.title: Matgary — All-in-one shop management
meta.description: Point of sale, inventory, reports, team — everything your store needs in one system. Free to start.

comparison.thisMonth: vs the same period last month
comparison.custom: vs the previous span of the same length

highlights.title: Period summary
highlights.subtitle: Key signals from the selected period
highlights.empty: Not enough data to summarise yet.

empty.title: No data for this period
empty.subtitle: Numbers show up once a staff member records the first sale.

unattributed.title: Sales with no assigned staff
unattributed.body: {count} transactions worth {amount} had no recording staff member (legacy sales from before this feature was enabled).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.greetingStaff: Glad to have you with us today

void.title: Delete sale
void.messageReturned: This sale is already returned. It will be permanently deleted.
void.message: The sale will be deleted and {n} pcs of "{name}" will be returned to stock.

table.rowCustomerTooltip: Show all invoices for this customer

print.title: Print options
print.fitToPageLabel: Fit to page (no gap below the receipt)
print.fitToPageHint: Stretches the receipt to fill the full page height.
print.tipBody: Pick "Auto · one copy per sheet" (the default). This uses the printer's actual paper size so only one receipt prints per page. Use XP-330B only with a thermal printer.

totals.loyaltyTrimmedNote: Redemption was trimmed to match the available wallet balance and order total.

customer.namePlaceholder: Start typing to pick a past customer…
customer.phonePlaceholder: Start typing to pick a past number…

payment.label: Payment method
payment.deferredNote: This sale will be recorded on the customer's account. You can collect part of it now and the rest later.

backdate.label: Record sale on a past date

errors.futureDate: Can't record a sale for a future date
errors.sessionMissing: Your session is incomplete. Please reload the page.

brandsAdmin.title: Brands
brandsAdmin.noCategoriesHint: Add a category first, then come back to define brands.
brandsAdmin.empty: No brands for this category yet.

categoriesAdmin.title: Categories
categoriesAdmin.empty: No categories yet. Add your first one from the button above.

attributes.heading: Attributes
attributes.empty: No attributes yet. The wizard will skip step 2 for this category.

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.detailsHeading: Sales details for the selected period

actions.attendance.geofence_rejected: Check-in attempted from outside the shop area

empty.products: No products added yet. Start by adding one.

whatsappInbox.title: WhatsApp
whatsappInbox.notAllowed: You don't have permission to view WhatsApp conversations.
whatsappInbox.selectHint: Select a conversation to view messages.

list.emptyAll: No conversations yet. The first message from a customer will show up here.

thread.windowClosedError: The 24-hour window is closed. Use an approved template.
thread.outsideWindowHint: Free-form messages aren't allowed now — use an approved template.

windowState.noChat: Customer hasn't messaged yet — use a template
windowState.closed: Conversation window closed — use a template
windowState.endingSoon: Window closes within an hour — send quickly

page.title: Tasks
page.heading: Tasks
page.subhead: Track tasks assigned to you and update their status as you start or complete them.

empty.managerHint: Create tasks, assign them to staff, and set due dates. Staff get a notification as soon as the task is assigned.
empty.staffHint: Any task your manager assigns will show up here.

shell.title: Platform admin
shell.signOutEverywhereConfirm: Sign out from every device? You'll have to log in again here too.

login.title: Platform admin
login.subtitle: Restricted access — sign in to continue.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
login.networkError: Could not reach the server. Try again.

home.placeholderIntro: This is the foundation slice. The real overview cards, tenant list, and tools land in Specs 02–08.

upNext.title: Up next
upNext.spec03: Spec 03 — Tenant write actions (suspend, extend trial).
upNext.spec04: Spec 04 — Plan editor that reflects on the landing page.

overview.title: Platform overview
overview.subtitle: How the whole platform is doing right now.

platform.title: Platform sales
platform.subtitle: How every store is selling, right now.

list.title: Sales by store
list.subtitle: Cross-store performance for the selected period. Click a row to drill in.
list.emptyHint: Try widening the date range or clearing filters.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Searchable record of every admin write. Reads are not logged; writes are.
audit.empty: No audit entries match this filter.
audit.emptyHint: Try clearing the action filter or expanding the date range.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.subtitle: Post system-wide banners shown in every tenant's app. Pick severity and audience carefully — every signed-in user will see them.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.subtitle: How the broadcast appears inside the tenant app
preview.asModal: Modal — first time each user sees it
preview.emptyTitle: Type a title to see the preview
preview.emptySub: We'll show how the banner — and, for critical, the popup — appears in the tenant app.

errors.INVALID_WINDOW: End time must be after start time.
errors.INVALID_TITLE_AR: Arabic title must be 120 chars or fewer.
errors.INVALID_TITLE_EN: English title must be 120 chars or fewer.
errors.BODY_TOO_LONG: Body must be 1000 chars or fewer.
errors.NO_TITLE: Please add a title in Arabic or English.
errors.INVALID: Please double-check the form and try again.

adminMgmt.title: Admins
adminMgmt.subtitle: Add, promote, or disable platform admins. Super-admin only.

addModal.title: Add admin
addModal.intro: Pick the role. We'll generate a temporary password to share with the new admin out-of-band — they'll be forced to set a real one on first login.

editModal.title: Edit admin
editModal.intro: Update display name, role, or disable/enable. The change takes effect on the admin's next request.

tempPasswordModal.title: Temporary password
tempPasswordModal.intro: Copy this password now and share it with {email} out-of-band. It will NOT be shown again. The admin will be forced to set a new one on first login.

resetConfirm.title: Reset password?
resetConfirm.intro: This signs {email} out of every device and forces them to set a new password on next login.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete admin?
deleteConfirm.intro: Delete {email} permanently. Their audit log entries will keep referencing this admin id; the UI will show '(deleted)' next to the name.

errors.SELF_TARGET: You can't perform this action on yourself.
errors.LAST_SUPER_ADMIN: Cannot remove the last enabled super-admin. Promote someone else first.
errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: An admin with that email already exists.
errors.USE_ACCOUNT_PAGE: Use the account page to rotate your own password.
errors.INVALID_ROLE: Role must be super_admin or ops_admin.

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Edit landing-page pricing, labels and feature lists. Changes go live within ~1 minute (no deploy).

fields.purchasableHint: If off, the plan still renders on the landing page but with a 'Coming soon' badge instead of a Subscribe button.

actions.savedToast: Saved. Landing page refreshes within ~1 minute.
actions.diffIntro: These edits will be visible on the landing page within ~1 minute.

errors.stale: Another admin updated this plan since you opened the editor. Reload the page and try again.
errors.localePairRequired: Send both Arabic and English when editing labels, taglines, or feature lists.
errors.invalidPrice: Price must be a non-negative integer below 100,000.

list.title: Stores
list.subtitle: Every store on the platform. Use the search and filters to drill into one.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by store name, owner email, phone…
list.emptyHint: Try clearing the filter or expanding the date range.

impersonateModal.title: Impersonate store owner
impersonateModal.intro: You're about to sign into this store as its owner. Every action is logged with your name AND theirs. This session is hard-capped at 30 minutes — you can exit any time.
impersonateModal.confirmLabel: Type the store name to confirm

errors.NO_OWNER: This store has no owner to impersonate.
errors.REDIS_UNAVAILABLE: Cache layer is unavailable — try again.

suspendModal.title: Suspend store
suspendModal.intro: The store will be locked out immediately. Owners and staff get bounced to a 'service paused' page until you unsuspend. Type a reason — the owner sees it.

unsuspendModal.title: Unsuspend store
unsuspendModal.intro: The store regains access immediately. Existing sessions stay logged out — owners and staff sign back in normally.

extendModal.title: Extend trial
extendModal.intro: Bump the trial end date by a number of days (1-90). The new end date will be visible to the owner on their billing page within ~1 minute.
extendModal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. requested 14 more days, paid pending
extendModal.errorNotTrialing: Trial can only be extended while the subscription is in 'trialing' state.

healthFlags.title: Health flags
healthFlags.cash_reconciliation_off: Cash reconciliation off on every branch

activity.title: Store activity
activity.subtitle: Last 500 entries from this store's activity log.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Update your display name or change your email. Use the password card below to rotate your password.

errors.needPassword: Enter your current password to change your email.

passwordCard.title: Password
passwordCard.subtitle: Rotate your password every 90 days. New passwords must be 12+ chars with a digit, uppercase, and lowercase letter, and must differ from the last 3.

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Pick a password that's at least 12 characters with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a digit.
password.requiredIntro: Your account is using the bootstrap default. Set a real password to continue.

rules.upperLower: At least one uppercase and one lowercase letter

errors.reused: You've used this password recently — pick a new one.
errors.generic: Could not change password. Try again.

activity.title: Activity log
activity.heading: Activity log
activity.subhead: Every action that happens in the system — who added, edited, or deleted.
activity.notAllowed: You don't have permission to view the activity log.
activity.empty: No actions recorded in this period.

customers.title: Customers

diagnostics.noneYetBody: You have {total} invoices in the system, but none of them has a customer name or phone recorded.
diagnostics.noneYetFix: Fix: when recording a sale, type the customer's name or mobile number in the "Customer" fields before pressing "Record sale".
diagnostics.refreshHint: If "missing" shows even though you filled the fields: the browser is loading an old copy of the app. Hard refresh: Ctrl+Shift+R (Windows) or Cmd+Shift+R (Mac), or open the page in incognito.
diagnostics.linkedSummary: Customer data attached to {n} of {total} invoices. The rest have no name/phone recorded.

receivables.title: On-account balances
receivables.subtitle: Customers who still owe money. Tap a row to record a payment.

settle.title: Record customer payment
settle.overpayHint: More than the customer owes — we won't credit the excess.

errors.INVALID_AMOUNT: Amount must be greater than zero.
errors.NOTHING_TO_SETTLE: No unpaid invoices found for this customer.
errors.GENERIC: Couldn't record the payment. Try again.

customers.bulkInactiveTitle: Copies all inactive numbers and opens WhatsApp on the first one
customers.bulkInactiveMessage: Hi! We've missed you at {shop}. Our new collection just arrived — come check it out 🌟
customers.emptyNoSales: No customers recorded yet. Add the name/phone when recording sales.

row.thanksMessage: Hi {name}! Thanks for shopping at {shop} ❤️ We look forward to seeing you again.
row.reminderMessage: Hi {name}, a friendly reminder of the {amount} balance you have at {shop}. Thank you!
row.newCollectionMessage: {name}! We just got a new collection of {category} at {shop}. Come check it out 🌟

receiptDesigner.title: Receipt designer
receiptDesigner.subhead: Drag any section to reorder it. Hover a section to reveal hide and edit icons.
receiptDesigner.logoFormatHint: PNG / JPEG / WebP / SVG — auto-resized so it prints sharply. Square aspect works best.

fonts.tajawal: Modern font for headings and shop names
fonts.lemonada: A playful, distinctive look for shops

receiptDesigner.emptyReceipt: Receipt is empty — add sections from "Hidden sections" below.

editor.title: Edit custom text
editor.placeholder: Type any text you want on the receipt

errors.unsupportedType: File type not supported. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG.
errors.tooLarge: File too large (over {n}MB). Try a smaller image.
errors.svgTooLarge: SVG too large. Try a simplified version.
errors.readFailed: Couldn't read the image. Try another file.
errors.processFailed: Couldn't process the image. Try another file.

list.title: Staff
list.emptyHint: Create an account for each staff member to grant them access to the system and let them record sales and attendance.

toast.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
toast.renameSuccess: Login handle changed — let your staff know the new address

credModal.title: Staff login credentials
credModal.intro: Save these now or send them to the employee — the password won't be shown again.
credModal.verifyIdle: Tries the credentials on the server and tells you whether they'd work.

resetModal.title: Reset password
resetModal.intro: {name} will be asked to change the password on next sign-in.

deleteModal.title: Delete employee
deleteModal.warning: {login} won't be able to sign in anymore. This can't be undone.

renameModal.title: Store login handle
renameModal.intro: Your staff sign in as {pattern}. Changing it updates every staff member's address automatically.

employeeForm.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters — staff changes it on first sign-in
employeeForm.branchHint: Pick the branch this employee works at. They'll only see this branch's data on sign-in.

errors.credentialsRequired: Username and a password of at least 8 characters are required
errors.identityRequired: Phone, national ID, and address are required

photoUpload.dropHint: Drop the image here or click to choose

branchesPage.title: Branches
branchesPage.heading: Branches
branchesPage.subhead: Multiple branches let you track sales and inventory per location.
branchesPage.confirmDelete: Delete branch "{name}"? The operation will be refused if the branch has data (sales/expenses/inventory).

accountSecurity.title: Security
accountSecurity.staffNotice: Two-factor authentication is available to the store owner only in this version.
accountSecurity.heading: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
accountSecurity.subhead: An extra layer of protection on top of your password — an authenticator app on your phone generates a 6-digit code that changes every 30 seconds.
accountSecurity.enrollStep1: 1) Open an authenticator app on your phone (Google Authenticator / Microsoft Authenticator / Authy), then choose "Add account → Scan code":
accountSecurity.manualHint: In the authenticator app, choose "Add account → Manual entry" and paste this key:
accountSecurity.linkHint: Or on the same device, tap the link to add the account directly:
accountSecurity.enrollStep2: 2) Enter the 6-digit code your app shows now:
accountSecurity.codesHeading: Save these recovery codes in a safe place — they won't be shown again. Each code works once and unlocks your account if you lose your phone.
accountSecurity.disableHint: This weakens your account protection. Only do this if you're sure.
accountSecurity.disableButton: Disable (uses the same password + code above)

delete.title: Delete store permanently
delete.intro: Deletes all data (products, sales, staff, logs) after a 30-day grace period. You can cancel during that window.
delete.confirmHint: To confirm, type the store slug as it appears in the login URL:

export.title: Download a copy of your store data
export.intro: A JSON file with every table belonging to this store (products, sales, staff, logs…). Downloaded directly to your device.

revoke.title: Sign out of all devices
revoke.intro: Ends every session for this account immediately, including the current one. Useful if you lost a device or suspect your account is compromised.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.mustChange: You must change your password before continuing
changePassword.tooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters

toast.needPhone: Enter a phone number to test
toast.needCloudCreds: Enter Phone Number ID and the token first
toast.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect WhatsApp? You can reconnect later.

branches.title: Branches
branches.hintOne: Add a new branch to track sales and inventory per location.
branches.hintMany: Manage branches, disable or delete a branch, and update location data.

cashDrawerTile.title: Cash drawer settings
cashDrawerTile.subtitle: Enable drawer counting and the Z-report per branch.

digestTile.title: Daily WhatsApp digest
digestTile.subtitle: Receive a daily message with the day's highlights per branch.

activityTile.title: Activity log
activityTile.subtitle: Who did what — every edit, sale, return, and staff action.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.subtitle: Customer points and credit — each branch has its own programme.
loyalty.exampleBody: A 100 EGP invoice earns {earned} points worth {value} off a future invoice.
loyalty.exampleWarning: ⚠ Points won't be earned or redeemed until at least one rate is set.

receiptCard.heading: Receipt customisation
receiptCard.subhead: Look and language of the printed receipt — each branch has its own settings.
receiptCard.logoHint: If your thermal printer renders the logo poorly, choose "Small" or "No logo".
receiptCard.footerPlaceholder: e.g. Returns within 7 days with the invoice. Follow us on Instagram @yourshop
receiptCard.showLoyalty: Show points and credit on the receipt
receiptCard.showLoyaltyHint: Prints "points earned" and "wallet balance" — the strongest nudge for using the loyalty programme. Requires the loyalty programme to be enabled.

whatsapp.autoOpenHint: When you record a sale for a customer with a mobile number, the app opens WhatsApp with the invoice + a thank-you message ready. You just press "Send".

greenApi.step3: From the Instance screen, copy the idInstance and apiTokenInstance and paste them into the fields below
greenApi.step4: Scan the QR from the shop phone's WhatsApp once to link the account
greenApi.step5: Enable the option, press "Save settings", then try sending from the test section
greenApi.warning: Heads-up: Green API uses the unofficial WhatsApp Web protocol. Normal store usage is safe, but bulk or rapid messaging can get the number blocked.
greenApi.enable: Enable automatic sending via Green API
greenApi.enableHint: When enabled, invoices are sent in the background — no tab opens.
greenApi.sendAsPdf: Send invoice as a PDF file instead of a link
greenApi.sendAsPdfHint: When enabled, the customer receives the invoice as a PDF attachment on WhatsApp (with the message text as a caption). Cleaner and more professional than a link. Requires Green API enabled.
greenApi.urlLabel: apiUrl (optional — from the Green API screen)
greenApi.testHint: Sends a short "🧪 test message" to verify the connection. Save settings after a successful test.

cloudApi.section: WhatsApp Cloud API — Meta's official channel
cloudApi.connectIntro: Press "Connect WhatsApp" to open Meta Embedded Signup. You'll pick a WhatsApp Business account, add/verify a number, approve permissions, and we'll save the token encrypted automatically — no manual copy-paste.

step2.suffixHtml: create an app of type Business and add the WhatsApp product

manualSteps.step3Html: From the WhatsApp > API Setup screen, attach the shop's number (Add phone number) and verify it via SMS/call
manualSteps.step4Html: Copy the Phone number ID and paste it in the field below (it's not the mobile number — the ID is a 15–17 digit number)

step5.suffixHtml: with the whatsapp_business_messaging and whatsapp_business_management scopes, and paste it in the Access Token field (the temporary 24-hour token won't work in production)

manualSteps.step6: Enable the option and press "Save settings", then test sending from the test box

manualNotes.windowHtml: Meta only allows free-form messages within a 24-hour window after the customer's first message.
manualNotes.pdf: PDF sending works either way (inside or outside the window) when the attachment is part of an approved template.
manualNotes.official: The channel is official and stable — it won't expose your number to bans the way Green API might.

cloudApi.manualEnable: Enable automatic sending via WhatsApp Cloud API
cloudApi.manualEnableHint: When enabled, invoices send in the background via the official channel. If both Green API and Cloud API are enabled, the app uses Cloud API.
cloudApi.testHint: If you see "Recipient phone number not in allowed list", you're still in sandbox — add the recipient from the API Setup screen or get the app approved to exit sandbox.

errorState.token_expired: Token expired. Press "Reconnect" to issue a new one.
errorState.token_revoked: Token was revoked by Meta. Press "Reconnect" to re-authenticate.
errorState.scope_missing: Token is missing required scopes. Reconnect and approve all permissions.
errorState.phone_unverified: The phone number isn't verified on Meta. Finish verification in Business Manager.
errorState.waba_inaccessible: Couldn't reach the WhatsApp Business account. Check permissions or reconnect.
errorState.network: Couldn't reach Meta temporarily. Try again in a moment.

templates.subhead: Only approved templates can be used to send outside the 24-hour window. Approve templates in Meta Business Manager, then press sync here.
templates.empty: No templates saved yet. Create them in Meta Business Manager and press "Sync from Meta".
templates.receiptHint: If a template is selected, the app sends the receipt as a Meta-approved template message instead of a PDF — which works even outside the 24-hour window. The template must have 4 body variables in this order:

shopInfo.phoneHint: Used in message signatures and the tel: link on customer invoices.

vars.invoiceCode: Last 8 chars of the invoice ID

tabDescriptions.team: Add staff, set their permissions, and manage their profiles and photos.
tabDescriptions.attendance: Track check-ins and check-outs throughout the day.
tabDescriptions.payroll: Manage fixed salaries, hourly rates, and earnings.
tabDescriptions.leaves: Leave requests — submit and approve them.
tabDescriptions.settings: Work hours, weekend days, overtime multiplier, and store locations.

selfCheckIn.notYetToday: You haven't clocked in yet today

toast.geoFailed: Couldn't read your location — make sure location services are enabled

weekend.label: Weekend days (their hours count as overtime)

locations.title: Store locations
locations.intro: When staff clock in from their phones, we verify they're inside one of these locations. Add at least one to enable geolocation check-ins.
locations.linkHelp: In Google Maps, right-click the spot → copy the coordinates, or share the link and paste it here.
locations.parseFailed: Couldn't read coordinates from the text.

attendanceSettings.footnote: These settings drive overtime calculation and check-in validation. Changes apply from the next day onwards and don't affect already-saved periods.

toast.geoDenied: Couldn't read your location — check permissions
toast.coordsRequired: Paste a Google Maps link or coordinates (e.g. 30.044, 31.235)
toast.shortLinkNetwork: Couldn't reach the service to open the link

compensation.ownerOnly: Payroll management is available to the store owner only.

form.standardHours: Hours covered by the base salary / month

period.heading: Payroll summary — {label}
period.reviewNotice: There are {n} periods that need review (missed checkout). Resolve them from the "Attendance" tab before finalizing payroll.

tab.emptyManager: Staff requests will appear here as they're submitted.
tab.emptyEmployee: Submit your first leave request — your manager will see it and you'll be notified of the decision.

list.heading: Suppliers
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email

deleteDialog.title: Delete supplier
deleteDialog.message: Delete supplier "{name}"? This can't be undone.

detail.title: Supplier
detail.purchaseOrdersEmpty: No purchase orders for this supplier yet.
detail.paymentsEmpty: No payments recorded. Add one from the Expenses page using the "Supplier" category.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.heading: Purchases
purchases.emptyFiltered: No purchase orders match these filters.

receive.title: Receive purchase order
receive.message: Quantities will be added to inventory and the amount will be recorded as owed to the supplier. Continue?

cancel.title: Cancel purchase order
cancel.message: This order will be cancelled. Inventory won't be affected. Are you sure?

delete.title: Delete purchase order
delete.message: This order will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

deletePayment.title: Reverse payment
deletePayment.message: This payment will be deleted and the amount returned to the supplier's balance. Continue?

builder.title: New purchase order
builder.addExternal: Or add a free-text line (unregistered product)

errors.needLine: Add at least one line item

recurring.title: Auto-repeat
recurring.hint: The next copy will appear automatically on its due date — no manual entry.

table.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

billing.title: Subscription
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan, payments, and invoice history.
billing.ownerOnly: This page is for the store owner only.

statusLine.trialDaysLeft: {days} day(s) left in the free trial.
statusLine.pastDueWarning: The last payment failed. Retry to avoid service interruption.
statusLine.paymobNotConfigured: The payment gateway isn't set up on this server yet. Contact us for a manual upgrade until setup completes.

billing.cancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription? Service will stay active until the end of the paid period.

trial.label: Free trial
features: Switches to the chosen plan when the trial ends

professional.label: Professional
professional.tagline: Single store — everything your business needs

multi_branch.label: Multi-branch
multi_branch.tagline: Coming soon — to manage more than one store
features: Manage multiple branches from one account

list.title: Cash drawer shifts
list.subtitle: Every shift closes by counting the variance between expected and counted cash. Variances stay in the review queue until you sign off.
list.emptyHint: Try clearing the filter or open a new shift

review.title: Review shift
review.intro: Confirm you've reviewed this shift. You can add a note before approving.

force.title: Force close
force.intro: You'll close this shift without the cashier counting the drawer. A reason is required.
force.reasonRequired: Type the reason for the force close

openModal.title: Open a cash drawer shift
openModal.intro: Type the cash you have in the drawer right now before you start selling. Anything coming in or out after that is counted automatically.
openModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. found 200 EGP from yesterday's shift

closeModal.title: Close cash drawer shift
closeModal.countedLabel: Count the cash and enter it here
closeModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. 30 EGP went missing in change

kinds.paid_out: Withdrawal — cash out of the drawer

cashDrawerSettings.title: Cash drawer settings
cashDrawerSettings.intro: When the drawer is enabled for a branch, the cashier must open a shift before recording cash sales, and at close they'll compare the counted total against the expected and log the variance.
cashDrawerSettings.thresholdLabel: Variance amount that requires a note (₤)

digestSettings.title: Daily WhatsApp digest
digestSettings.intro: Every day at the time you pick, you'll receive a WhatsApp with the day's sales, the top-selling product, any alerts, and a flag if any shift needs review.

enable.title: Enable digest
enable.onLine: ✅ On — you'll receive a message at {hour}:00 in your local time

phone.title: Primary WhatsApp number
phone.intro: The number that will receive the daily digest. This is NOT the same as the WhatsApp number you send customer receipts from — this is your personal number where the report will land.
phone.label: WhatsApp number

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.intro: The default is 12 midnight (end of day). You can set it to whatever time fits your closing routine.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.sendOnEmpty: Send the message even when there were no sales
behavior.emailFallback: Send by email as a fallback if WhatsApp fails

extras.title: Extra recipients
extras.intro: Add other WhatsApp numbers or emails to receive the same message (e.g. your accountant).

preview.title: Preview
preview.intro: See what today's message would look like — useful before turning the digest on for the first time.

search.placeholder: Search by name, barcode, tag, brand, or supplier…

empty.filters: No results match the current filters
empty.fresh: No products yet. Start by adding one.

confirmDelete.title: Delete product
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

confirmBulkDelete.title: Bulk delete
confirmBulkDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {n} products? This can't be undone.

history.title: History: {name}
history.empty: No history for this product yet

result.summaryWithFailed: Added {created} new products, updated {updated}, and {failed} rows failed

guide.heading: File columns (order doesn't matter, but the names are case-sensitive):
guide.skuHint: — optional; if present it's used to update an existing product instead of creating a new one.
guide.templateLink: Download a template pre-filled with this branch's categories

drop.instructionLine: Drop a CSV file here or
drop.footnote: CSV only · up to 2 MB · UTF-8 (Excel: save as "CSV UTF-8")

errors.tooLarge: File is larger than 2 MB. Split it into smaller files.

preview.errorBanner: {n} rows have errors. Fix the file and re-upload — we won't commit a partial import.

addProduct.title: Add new product
addProduct.heading: Add a new product
addProduct.subtitle: Three quick steps: pick a category, set attributes, then fill in the details.

footer.readyHint: Ready to save? Check the preview on the side.

step2.heading: Set product attributes
step2.subhead: These attributes appear in reports and filters — pick them carefully.

step3.heading: Product details
step3.subhead: Review before saving — changes appear in the live preview on the side.

basics.title: Basics
basics.subtitle: What staff and customers see on the invoice.

pricing.title: Pricing and stock
pricing.subtitle: Cost price drives profit calculation in reports.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.footnote: The preview updates as you type.

impersonationBanner.message: You are viewing this store as {owner} via platform support ({admin}).

servicePaused.title: Your service is paused
servicePaused.message: Access to your store has been temporarily paused by Matgary support. Contact us to resolve the issue and reactivate your account.
servicePaused.contactHint: Get in touch on WhatsApp to learn how to restore service.

hero.subhead: Matgary is a unified system for everything your shop needs daily — from sales and inventory to staff and real-time reports.

features.title: Tools built to work together
features.body: Not a tangle of separate apps — every piece is designed to feed the next and save you time and mistakes.

team.title: Permissions sized to each role
team.body: The cashier doesn't see reports. The warehouse manager can't reach settings. You set the boundaries — the system enforces them.

unlimited.title: Unlimited inventory
unlimited.body: No item caps between plans. Create whatever you need.

whatsapp.title: Receipt on WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: After every sale, the receipt reaches the customer directly.

customers.title: Know your customers — bring them back
customers.body: Track each customer's last visit, spot who's been away, then reach out with a bulk WhatsApp message in one tap.

inventory.title: Stock control without mistakes
inventory.body: Track every item from arrival to sale. Automatic stocktake catches what's missing before it becomes a problem.

pos.title: A POS that keeps your pace
pos.body: Open the invoice, scan the barcode, print the receipt — all in seconds. Works on any device, even with no internet temporarily.

reports.title: Reports that understand your store
reports.body: Not raw numbers. Smart analytics tell you which item drives profit, which hour is busiest, and which customer last walked in.

how.title: From a fresh account to your first sale
how.subhead: Three easy steps — and you're ready to run your shop from any device.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.body: Quick signup — shop name, your email, a password. Under a minute.

steps.title: Add your products
steps.body: Import your product list from CSV or add them by hand with categories and prices.

steps.title: Start selling
steps.body: Open the POS and ring up your first sale. Inventory and reports update automatically.

pricing.title: One plan. Choose your billing.
pricing.subhead: Same features in every plan — the only difference is the term and the total price.
pricing.includedBody: There's no "basic" plan with features cut. Everyone gets the full system.
included: Public catalog on a custom domain
pricing.disclaimer: Prices in Egyptian pounds — cancel any time.

items.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
items.a: No. You can create your account and try every feature free, with no payment card.
Yes — every screen is designed to work on phone and tablet as smoothly as desktop, including the POS.

items.q: Can I add staff with specific permissions?
items.a: Absolutely. Create staff accounts and decide what they can see (inventory, reports, settings…) and what they can do, all in a click.
Yes. Every shop runs fully isolated from other shops at the database level (Row-Level Security), and all sensitive data is encrypted.

items.q: What happens if the internet drops?
items.a: The POS keeps working and records sales locally, then syncs automatically when the connection returns — you won't lose a sale.

items.q: Can I import my existing products?
items.a: Yes. We support CSV import, and our support team helps you migrate from any other system.

cta.subhead: Full setup in under a minute. Free, no strings.

footer.tagline: Shop management — everything your store needs to run smoothly and grow with confidence.
footer.disclaimer: Matgary is an operational shop-management system. Receipts it issues are for operational use and are not a substitute for the Egyptian Tax Authority (ETA) e-invoicing system. Tax-registered merchants must issue their tax invoices through the ETA portal separately.

showcase.lead: Your complete system for sales and inventory — built for Arabic-speaking shops to grow with confidence and speed.

meta.title: About — Matgary
meta.description: Matgary is a shop-management system built for Arabic-speaking merchants — our story, mission, and values.

about.title: We build the tool we wished we had
about.lead: We started Matgary because shop owners were stuck with complex systems, spreadsheets, or paper ledgers — each costing them time or money. We set out to build one system: Arabic-first, simple, and reliable.
about.p1: Matgary is a complete shop-management system — point of sale, inventory, reports, team and permissions — all in one place. We serve small and medium retailers across Egypt and the Arab region, and we treat every shop as a personal project, not a number.
about.p2: Our philosophy is simple: shops don't need more than they need. They need one working tool that understands what's happening in the store and helps the owner decide right. For every feature we build, we ask first: will the merchant use this every day? If the answer is no, we don't build it.

values.title: Simplicity first
values.body: A system any merchant can open and use from minute one — no long training, no tangled screens.

values.title: Your data is yours
values.body: Your shop is fully isolated from every other shop at the database level. What's yours stays with you.

values.title: Designed in Arabic
values.body: Every screen, every button, every report — written natively in Arabic by people who understand the market.

meta.title: Blog — Matgary
meta.description: Short, practical articles for shop owners — coming soon.

blog.title: Coming soon — articles for shop owners
blog.lead: We're working on short, practical content: selling tips, inventory tactics, reports you can read in seconds, and stories from real stores.
blog.body: We're putting together the first batch of articles. If you'd like a heads-up when the first piece lands, reach out and we'll let you know.

meta.title: Privacy policy — Matgary
meta.description: How we handle your data in Matgary, in line with the Egyptian Personal Data Protection Law.

privacy.title: Your data belongs to you
privacy.lead: Last updated: 7 May 2026 — compliant with Law No. 151 of 2020 on Personal Data Protection.

sections.title: 1. Who controls your data
sections.body: Matgary (the "Platform") is the data controller within the meaning of the Egyptian Personal Data Protection Law (Law No. 151 of 2020). For any matter relating to your data, use the contact page below.

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.body: We collect: (a) account data you provide — name, email, phone, shop name, national ID when attendance is enabled, employee photos when uploaded. (b) operational data your shop creates — products, sales, expenses, leave requests, attendance log. (c) limited technical data — IP address, browser type, sign-in time, for security and troubleshooting.

sections.title: 3. Legal basis and purposes
sections.body: We process your data under: performance of the contract with you (running the platform), legal obligations (such as tax invoice records), and legitimate interest in securing the service and preventing abuse. We do not use your data for advertising and do not sell it to any third party.

sections.title: 4. Your rights under Law 151/2020
sections.body: At any time you may: access your data, correct it, delete it, restrict its processing, or withdraw consent. You also have the right to data portability in a machine-readable format, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Personal Data Protection Centre. We commit to responding within 30 days of your request.

sections.title: 5. Cross-shop data isolation
sections.body: Every shop runs in database-level isolation (Row-Level Security) — staff of any other shop, and our internal systems, cannot access your data without explicit authorization. We test this isolation automatically on every release.

sections.title: 6. Encryption and technical protection
sections.body: All connections use TLS. Passwords are stored hashed (bcrypt). Sensitive credentials (e.g. WhatsApp Green API tokens) are stored encrypted in the database. Daily backups run automatically and are protected to the same standard.

sections.title: 7. Retention period
sections.body: We retain your data for the duration of your use of the service. When your account is deleted, we delete the data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law (tax invoice records are kept for 5 years per the Unified Tax Procedures Law).

sections.title: 8. Transfers outside Egypt
sections.body: We run our servers in jurisdictions that meet comparable protection standards. Where an external provider is needed, we ensure contractual or legal safeguards protect your data to the same level required by Egyptian law.

sections.title: 9. Cookies
sections.body: We use only the cookies strictly necessary for sign-in and CSRF protection. We do not use any tracking cookies for advertising, and we do not share your data with ad networks.

sections.title: 10. Children's data
sections.body: The service is intended for adult shop owners and staff. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 14. If we discover that an account belongs to a minor, we delete it as soon as verified.

sections.title: 11. Incident notification
sections.body: If a breach affects your personal data, we commit to notifying the Personal Data Protection Centre and you within 72 hours of discovery, where practicable, including the nature of the breach and the steps taken.

sections.title: 12. Updates to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. For any material change, we'll notify you via your registered email or in-app notice a reasonable time before it takes effect.

meta.title: Terms of use — Matgary
meta.description: Terms of use for the Matgary platform.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By using the Matgary platform (the "Service") you confirm you are of legal age (18+) and have full capacity to contract, and you agree to be bound by these terms and the privacy policy. If you do not agree to any clause, please do not use the Service.

sections.title: 2. Service description
sections.body: Matgary is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform for managing retail stores: point of sale, inventory, invoices, staff, reports, and related features. The Service is provided online without local software installation. We aim to keep it available with reasonable uptime (with no 99.9% contractual SLA on the base plans).

sections.title: 3. Account and responsibility
sections.body: You are responsible for the confidentiality of your sign-in details and for all activity on your account. If you suspect unauthorized access, you must notify us immediately and change your password. The data you provide (name, email, phone, shop name, national ID where required) must be accurate and up to date.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable use
sections.body: You may use Matgary only to manage lawful commercial activity. It is prohibited to: (a) carry out any activity contrary to Egyptian law or public morals, (b) attempt to breach the Platform or access another shop's data, (c) misuse the APIs or overload the infrastructure with excessive requests, (d) use the Service to send unsolicited promotional messages (spam) over WhatsApp or otherwise.

sections.title: 5. Payment and subscriptions
sections.body: During the trial period the Service may be free or available at reduced prices announced on the pricing page. After that, subscription fees are billed in advance through an approved payment gateway. You may cancel at any time, and the Service remains active until the end of the paid period. If a payment fails, you get a 7-day grace period before account suspension.

sections.title: 6. E-invoices and taxes
sections.body: If you are a merchant registered with the Egyptian Tax Authority, you alone are responsible for issuing your electronic tax invoices via the ETA system. Matgary's invoicing features in the current version are for internal operational purposes and may not substitute for the official e-invoicing system. Check the features page for updates.

sections.title: 7. Data ownership
sections.body: You retain full ownership of your shop's data. We process it strictly as a service provider and do not share it with any third party. On termination, you may export your data within 30 days before final deletion.

sections.title: 8. Downtime and maintenance
sections.body: We perform periodic maintenance, scheduled at low-traffic times where possible with prior notice when feasible. Short unscheduled outages may occur due to unexpected faults; we work to restore the Service as quickly as possible.

sections.title: 9. Limits of liability
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is" without express or implied warranties beyond what the law requires. In any case, our cumulative liability for any damage related to the Service is limited to what you actually paid in the 12 months preceding the damage. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses such as lost profits or reputation.

sections.title: 10. Account suspension and termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate your account if these terms are breached or the Platform is misused, with prior notice of the reason whenever possible. You may terminate your subscription at any time from your account settings.

sections.title: 11. Changes to the terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. For any material change, we'll notify you via your registered email or in-app notice at least 14 days before it takes effect. Continued use after the change constitutes acceptance.

sections.title: 12. Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt, and any dispute arising from them falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Cairo.
